name: jfe-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to the Journal of Financial Economics (JFE), one of the top-3 finance journals, published by Elsevier and known for methodologically demanding empirical corporate finance and asset pricing. Covers topic selection, literature positioning, credible identification (natural experiments, IV, staggered DID, RDD), empirical design (factor construction, Fama-MacBeth/GMM, clustered standard errors), exhaustive robustness, exhibit craft, the journal-hosted Internet Appendix, house writing style, submission preflight, referee strategy, and R&R rebuttals. Bilingual en / zh-CN docs; Stata / R / Python pointers.
